# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build Notifications

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, edited, reopened, synchronize, ready_for_review]

permissions:
  contents: read
  pull-requests: read

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      PR_BRANCH: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}
      PR_HEAD_SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Set PR metadata
        id: prmeta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          {
            echo "title<<EOF"
            printf '%s\n' "$PR_TITLE"
            echo "EOF"
            echo "body<<EOF"
            printf '%s\n' "$PR_BODY"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Building PR #$PR_NUMBER"
          echo "Title: $PR_TITLE"
          echo "Description: $PR_BODY"

      - name: Post build notification
        if: always()
        shell: bash
        run: |
          cat <<EOF
          {
            "text": "Build finished for PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}",
            "attachments": [
              {
                "fields": [
                  { "title": "PR", "value": "#${PR_NUMBER}", "short": true },
                  { "title": "Branch", "value": "${PR_BRANCH}", "short": true },
                  { "title": "Title", "value": "${PR_TITLE}", "short": false },
                  { "title": "Description", "value": "${PR_BODY}", "short": false },
                  { "title": "URL", "value": "${PR_URL}", "short": false }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF

      - name: Create deployment commit message
        id: commitmsg
        shell: bash
        run: |
          SAFE_TITLE="${PR_TITLE//$'\n'/ }"
          echo "message=deploy: ${SAFE_TITLE} (#${PR_NUMBER})" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Use PR title in release note marker
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "Release tracking: ${{ steps.commitmsg.outputs.message }}"
